metadata.title: Dividdy - Split Expenses Easily
metadata.description: Simplify managing and settling shared expenses for groups. Track who paid for what and calculate who owes whom.

hero.subtitle: Track group expenses, calculate fair splits, and settle debts with ease. No more awkward money conversations.

features.title: How it works
features.subtitle: Simple, transparent expense sharing in three easy steps

groups.title: Create a Group
groups.description: Start a group for your trip, apartment, or any shared activity. Invite members with a simple link.

expenses.title: Add Expenses
expenses.description: Log who paid for what. Split equally, by percentage, shares, or itemize individual costs.

settlement.title: Settle Up
settlement.description: See who owes whom at a glance. We minimize transactions so settling is quick and easy.

instant.title: Instant Setup
instant.description: Create a group and start tracking in seconds

noSignup.title: No Signup Required
noSignup.description: Just share the link, no accounts needed

multiCurrency.title: Multi-Currency
multiCurrency.description: Support for international trips and expenses

cta.title: Ready to simplify your expenses?
cta.subtitle: Create your first group and start tracking expenses in seconds.

createGroup.title: Create a New Group
createGroup.minMembers: Add at least 2 members to create a group

group.shareLink: Share this link to invite members
group.noExpensesDescription: Add your first expense to get started

expense.title: Expense Details
expense.exactDescription: Specify exact amount for each member
expense.itemizedDescription: Add items and assign to members

balances.title: Balances
balances.subtitle: See who owes whom in your group
balances.allSettledDescription: No outstanding balances in this group

settlement.title: Settle Up
settlement.subtitle: Simplified transactions to settle all debts
settlement.minimizedTransactions: We've minimized the number of transactions needed

settings.title: Group Settings
settings.deleteWarning: This action cannot be undone. All expenses and data will be permanently deleted.
